title: Model Inference with Offload Strategy
description: Adaptive inference strategy: running the diffusion model with memory offloading when GPU VRAM is limited
offload_flags: offload_network: bool — offload diffusion transformer (model.model) after inference
offload_tokenizer: bool — offload tokenizer (model.tokenizer) after decoding
offload_text_encoder_model: bool — offload T5 encoder after embedding
offload_guardrail_models: bool — offload safety classifiers after checks
offload_prompt_upsampler: bool — offload prompt upsampler after use
initialization_flow: _load_model() — always called; loads model config skeleton (no weights yet)
[if NOT offload_text_encoder_model] → _load_text_encoder_model() — loads T5 to GPU
[if NOT offload_network] → _load_network() — loads diffusion transformer weights to GPU
[if NOT offload_tokenizer] → _load_tokenizer() — loads tokenizer weights to GPU
generate_flow_t2w: DECISION: is_safe? — if False → return None (UNSAFE EXIT)
[if NOT disable_guardrail] → re-run guardrail on upsampled prompt — if False → return None
DECISION: video is None? → if True → return None (UNSAFE EXIT)
_run_model_with_offload_t2w: get_video_batch(model, embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames) → data_batch, state_shape
generate_world_from_text(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, num_steps, seed) → sample (latent Tensor)
_run_model_with_offload_v2w: generate_world_from_video(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, num_steps, seed, condition_latent, num_input_frames) → sample
_offload_network_detail: if self.model.model: del self.model.model → self.model.model = None
key_decisions: offload_network flag → determines if diffusion transformer is loaded/unloaded per-inference
offload_tokenizer flag → determines if tokenizer encoder/decoder is loaded/unloaded per-inference
offload_text_encoder_model flag → T5 encoder load/unload around embedding step
offload_guardrail_models flag → safety model load/unload around each guardrail check
disable_guardrail flag → skip all safety checks entirely
enable_prompt_upsampler + word_count vs limit → conditional prompt enhancement
guardrail result (is_safe) → early exit if False at prompt or video check
memory_lifecycle: Non-offload mode: all models stay on GPU throughout pipeline lifetime
Offload mode: each model is loaded to GPU only when needed, then deleted + gc + cuda_empty_cache()
Order during offload inference: tokenizer (encode) → network (generate) → offload network → tokenizer (decode) → offload tokenizer
V2W adds tokenizer encoding step BEFORE network load (encode condition frames first)
inheritance: BaseWorldGenerationPipeline (ABC): defines interface + shared offload helpers
DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline: implements T2W model loading + _run_model + _run_model_with_offload + generate
DiffusionVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline: overrides _run_model (adds condition_latent) + _run_model_with_offload (adds tokenizer encoding step) + generate
external_utilities: generate_world_from_video() — runs diffusion sampling loop with condition latent (V2W)
get_condition_latent() — encodes conditioning image/video to latent
important_notes: The offload pattern is consistent: check flag → load → use → offload. _offload_network deletes model.model (the DiT weights) not the full model object. T2W _run_model_with_offload has a likely bug at line 318: calls _load_tokenizer() instead of nothing (tokenizer already loaded). V2W uses tokenizer BEFORE the network (encode condition frames first, then generate). All offload methods call gc.collect() + torch.cuda.empty_cache() to reclaim VRAM.
